import asyncio
import logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s %\(name\)s - %\(levelname\)s - %\(message\)s'\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        print\('=== ログイン中 \(headless\) ==='\)
        ok = await scraper.login\(\)
        print\(f'ログイン結果: {ok}'\)
        if ok:
            print\(f'現在のURL: {scraper._page.url}'\)
            print\('=== スクレイプ実行 ==='\)
            data = await scraper.scrape\(\)
            print\(f'取得データ: total={data.get\(\\"total\\"\)}, holdings件数={len\(data.get\(\\"holdings\\", []\)\)}'\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
import logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        
        # ログインページのHTMLを確認（認証情報なしでアクセス可能な範囲）
        await scraper._page.goto\('https://ssnb.x.moneyforward.com/users/sign_in', wait_until='networkidle'\)
        
        # フォーム構造を確認
        inputs = await scraper._page.query_selector_all\('input'\)
        print\('=== ログインフォームのinput要素 ==='\)
        for inp in inputs:
            name = await inp.get_attribute\('name'\)
            type_ = await inp.get_attribute\('type'\)
            print\(f'  <input name=\\"{name}\\" type=\\"{type_}\\">'\)
        
        buttons = await scraper._page.query_selector_all\('button'\)
        print\(f'button数: {len\(buttons\)}'\)
        for b in buttons[:5]:
            text = await b.inner_text\(\)
            type_ = await b.get_attribute\('type'\)
            print\(f'  <button type=\\"{type_}\\">{text.strip\(\)[:30]}</button>'\)
            
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        # ポートフォリオページ（ログイン後ページ構造を推測）
        # ログインページから構造を確認
        await scraper._page.goto\('https://ssnb.x.moneyforward.com/bs/portfolio', wait_until='networkidle'\)
        url = scraper._page.url
        print\(f'URL after goto portfolio: {url}'\)
        
        if 'sign_in' in url:
            print\('→ ログインページにリダイレクト（認証が必要）'\)
            # ログインページのHTMLを調べてリダイレクト後の構造を推測
            # 代わりにデモページや静的HTMLから構造を推測する
            print\('ポートフォリオページのセレクタはログイン後に確認が必要'\)
            return
            
        # ログイン済みの場合はページ構造を確認
        html = await scraper._page.content\(\)
        print\(f'HTMLサイズ: {len\(html\)} bytes'\)
        
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /d/VSCode/AssetBridge && PYTHONPATH=/d/VSCode/AssetBridge .venv/Scripts/python -c "
import asyncio, logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        # ログインフォーム送信してそのまま2FAページに到達
        await scraper._page.goto\('https://ssnb.x.moneyforward.com/users/sign_in', wait_until='networkidle'\)
        from apps.api.src.config.settings import settings
        
        EMAIL_SEL = 'input[name=\\"sign_in_session_service[email]\\"]'
        PASS_SEL = 'input[name=\\"sign_in_session_service[password]\\"]'
        SUBMIT_SEL = 'input[name=\\"commit\\"][type=\\"submit\\"]'
        
        await scraper._page.fill\(EMAIL_SEL, settings.MF_EMAIL\)
        await scraper._page.fill\(PASS_SEL, settings.MF_PASSWORD\)
        await scraper._page.click\(SUBMIT_SEL\)
        
        import asyncio as aio
        await aio.sleep\(3\)
        
        url = scraper._page.url
        print\(f'URL after login: {url}'\)
        
        if 'two_step' in url:
            print\('=== 2FA ページの構造 ==='\)
            inputs = await scraper._page.query_selector_all\('input'\)
            for inp in inputs:
                name = await inp.get_attribute\('name'\)
                type_ = await inp.get_attribute\('type'\)
                placeholder = await inp.get_attribute\('placeholder'\)
                print\(f'  <input name=\\"{name}\\" type=\\"{type_}\\" placeholder=\\"{placeholder}\\">'\)
            
            # ページテキストも確認
            text = await scraper._page.inner_text\('body'\)
            print\('--- ページテキスト（先頭500文字）---'\)
            print\(text[:500]\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, logging, os
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s %\(name\)s - %\(levelname\)s - %\(message\)s'\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        ok = await scraper.login\(\)
        print\(f'Login: {ok}, URL: {scraper._page.url}'\)
        if ok:
            data = await scraper.scrape\(\)
            total = data.get\('total', {}\)
            holdings = data.get\('holdings', []\)
            print\(f'total_jpy={total.get\(\\"total_jpy\\"\)}, holdings={len\(holdings\)}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback; traceback.print_exc\(\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)

import asyncio, logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s %\(name\)s - %\(levelname\)s - %\(message\)s'\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        # ログインページに直接アクセス
        await scraper._page.goto\('https://ssnb.x.moneyforward.com/users/sign_in', wait_until='networkidle'\)
        from apps.api.src.config.settings import settings
        EMAIL_SEL = 'input[name=\\"sign_in_session_service[email]\\"]'
        PASS_SEL = 'input[name=\\"sign_in_session_service[password]\\"]'
        SUBMIT_SEL = 'input[name=\\"commit\\"][type=\\"submit\\"]'
        await scraper._page.fill\(EMAIL_SEL, settings.MF_EMAIL\)
        await scraper._page.fill\(PASS_SEL, settings.MF_PASSWORD\)
        await scraper._page.click\(SUBMIT_SEL\)
        import asyncio as aio; await aio.sleep\(3\)
        url_after_login = scraper._page.url
        print\(f'After login URL: {url_after_login}'\)
        
        if 'two_step' in url_after_login:
            print\('2FA page reached. Now try fill verification_code...'\)

                await scraper._page.fill\('input[name=\\"verification_code\\"]', '00000000'\)
                print\('fill OK'\)
            except Exception as e:

        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)

import asyncio, logging, os, traceback as tb
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        await scraper._page.goto\('https://ssnb.x.moneyforward.com/users/sign_in', wait_until='networkidle'\)
        from apps.api.src.config.settings import settings
        EMAIL_SEL = 'input[name=\\"sign_in_session_service[email]\\"]'
        PASS_SEL = 'input[name=\\"sign_in_session_service[password]\\"]'
        SUBMIT_SEL = 'input[name=\\"commit\\"][type=\\"submit\\"]'
        await scraper._page.fill\(EMAIL_SEL, settings.MF_EMAIL\)
        await scraper._page.fill\(PASS_SEL, settings.MF_PASSWORD\)
        await scraper._page.click\(SUBMIT_SEL\)
        await asyncio.sleep\(3\)
        
        url = scraper._page.url
        print\(f'Step 1 OK: URL={url}'\)
        
        # _handle_2fa の内容を直接実行
        print\(f'Step 2: TOTP_SEED check = {bool\(settings.MF_TOTP_SEED\)}'\)
        
        env_code = os.environ.get\('MF_2FA_CODE', ''\)
        print\(f'Step 3: env_code = {repr\(env_code\)}'\)
        
        if env_code:
            print\('Step 4: filling verification_code...'\)
            await scraper._page.fill\('input[name=\\"verification_code\\"]', env_code\)
            print\('Step 5: fill OK, clicking submit...'\)
            await scraper._page.click\('input[name=\\"commit\\"][type=\\"submit\\"]'\)
            print\('Step 6: click OK'\)
            
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERROR: {e}'\)
        tb.print_exc\(\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.WARNING\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        await scraper.login\(\)
        await scraper._page.goto\('https://ssnb.x.moneyforward.com/bs/portfolio', wait_until='networkidle'\)
        
        # ページ内の全テキストから金額っぽいものを探す
        body_text = await scraper._page.inner_text\('body'\)
        lines = [l.strip\(\) for l in body_text.split\('\\n'\) if l.strip\(\)]
        print\('=== 金額・円含む行 ==='\)
        for line in lines:
            if '円' in line or \(',' in line and any\(c.isdigit\(\) for c in line\)\):
                print\(repr\(line[:100]\)\)
        
        print\('\\\\n=== 最初50行 ==='\)
        for line in lines[:50]:
            print\(repr\(line\)\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

            print\(f'TR[{i}] th={len\(ths\)} td={len\(cells\)} text={repr\(text[:80]\)}'\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)

import asyncio, logging
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s %\(name\)s - %\(levelname\)s - %\(message\)s'\)

async def run\(\):
    from apps.crawler.src.scrapers.mf_sbi_bank import MFSBIScraper
    scraper = MFSBIScraper\(headless=True\)
    try:
        await scraper.__aenter__\(\)
        print\('=== ログイン（セッションキャッシュ使用） ==='\)
        ok = await scraper.login\(\)
        print\(f'ログイン: {ok}  URL: {scraper._page.url}'\)
        if ok:
            print\('=== スクレイプ実行（一括更新→データ取得） ==='\)
            data = await scraper.scrape\(\)
            total = data.get\('total', {}\)
            holdings = data.get\('holdings', []\)
            
            print\(\)
            print\('=== 取得結果 ==='\)
            print\(f'総資産: ¥{total.get\(\\"total_jpy\\", 0\):,.0f}'\)
            bd = total.get\('breakdown', {}\)
            for k, v in bd.items\(\):
                print\(f'  {k}: ¥{v:,.0f}'\)
            print\(f'保有銘柄数: {len\(holdings\)}'\)
            if holdings:
                print\('保有銘柄（先頭5件）:'\)
                for h in holdings[:5]:
                    pnl = h.get\('unrealized_pnl_jpy', 0\)
                    sign = '+' if pnl >= 0 else ''
                    print\(f'  [{h[\\"asset_type\\"]}] {h[\\"name\\"][:20]:20} 評価額: ¥{h[\\"value_jpy\\"]:>12,.0f}  損益: {sign}¥{pnl:,.0f}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback; traceback.print_exc\(\)
    finally:
        await scraper.__aexit__\(None, None, None\)

asyncio.run\(run\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

    for h in history:
        print\(f'  {h.date}: 総資産 ¥{h.total_jpy:,.0f}  前日比 {h.prev_day_diff_jpy:+,.0f}'\)
    
    log_repo = ScrapeLogRepository\(db\)

from fastmcp import Client
import asyncio

async def test\(\):
    async with Client\('http://localhost:8001/mcp'\) as c:
        print\('=== MCPツール呼び出しテスト ==='\)
        # get_portfolio_summary \(MCPサーバはport8000のAPIを見てる\)
        # 新しいAPIのポートに向けるため、直接テスト
        import httpx
        api_base = 'http://localhost:19030/api'
        headers = {'X-API-Key': 'testkey'}
        
        r = await httpx.AsyncClient\(\).get\(f'{api_base}/portfolio/summary', headers=headers\)
        print\(f'portfolio/summary: {r.json\(\)}'\)
        
        r2 = await httpx.AsyncClient\(\).get\(f'{api_base}/insights/pnl-ranking?top=5', headers=headers\)
        pnl = r2.json\(\)
        print\(f'pnl-ranking top5:'\)
        for item in pnl.get\('ranking', []\):
            pnl_val = item.get\('unrealized_pnl_jpy', 0\)
            sign = '+' if pnl_val >= 0 else ''
            print\(f'  {item[\\"name\\"][:15]:15} {sign}¥{pnl_val:>12,.0f} \({item.get\(\\"unrealized_pnl_pct\\", 0\):+.1f}%\)'\)
        
        r3 = await httpx.AsyncClient\(\).get\(f'{api_base}/insights/allocation', headers=headers\)
        alloc = r3.json\(\)
        print\(f'allocation: {alloc}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
